author: kellyvv
name: Eval-time Adaptation: Stride-OGD + Two-Pass + NTK-RoPE
blurb: Three eval-time adaptation techniques: (1) Stride-OGD — online vocab bias updated every 64 tokens with exact gradient + EMA, zero artifact cost; (2) Two-Pass eval — collect gradients pass 1, re-score pass 2; (3) NTK-RoPE 4096 — extended context without retraining. All fit within 600s eval budget.
